Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.dropFiles: Take a photo or drop your files here
Dashboard.dropDescription: upload receipts, invoices and any other documents for me to scan

Welcome.description: I'm a little accountant app that helps you deal with endless receipts, checks and invoices with (you guessed it) AI. Here's what I can do:
Welcome.feature1: Upload me a photo or a PDF and I will recognize, categorize and save it as a transaction for your tax advisor.
Welcome.feature2: I can automatically convert currencies and look up exchange rates for a given date.
Welcome.feature3: I even support crypto! Historical exchange rates for staking too.
Welcome.feature4: All LLM prompts are configurable: for fields, categories and projects. You can go to settings and change them however you want.
Welcome.feature5: I save data in a local SQLite database and can export it to CSV and ZIP archives.
Welcome.feature6: You can even create your own new fields to be analyzed and they will be included in the CSV export for your tax advisor.
Welcome.feature7: I'm still very young and can make mistakes. Use me at your own risk!
Welcome.recommendation: While I can save you a lot of time in categorizing transactions and generating reports, I still highly recommend giving the results to a professional tax advisor for review when filing your taxes!
Welcome.setApiKey: Please give your ChatGPT key here

Backups.preparingBackup: Preparing backup. Don't close the page...
Backups.archiveDescription: Inside the archive you will find all the uploaded files, as well as JSON files for transactions, categories, projects, fields, currencies, and settings. You can view, edit or migrate your data to another service.
Backups.restoreWarning: ⚠️ This action is irreversible. Restoring from a backup will delete all existing data from your current database and remove all uploaded files. Be careful and make a backup first!
Backups.confirmDelete: I understand that it will permanently delete all existing data
Backups.restoring: Restoring from backup... (it can take a while)
Backups.restoreSuccessDesc: You can now continue using the app. Import stats:

DangerZone.title: The Danger Zone
DangerZone.description: The settings here will overwrite your existing fields, categories and prompts. Use them only if something is broken.
DangerZone.llmDescription: This will reset the system prompt and other LLM settings to their default values
DangerZone.fieldsDescription: This will reset all fields, currencies and categories to their default values
